	- locked <0x00000006d0000001> (a java.util.concurrent.locks.ReentrantLock)

Found one Java-level deadlock:
=============================
"indexer-worker-1":
  waiting to lock monitor 0x00000006d0000001 (object 0x00000006d0000001, a java.util.concurrent.locks.ReentrantLock),
  which is held by "indexer-worker-2"
"indexer-worker-2":
  waiting to lock monitor 0x00000006d0000002 (object 0x00000006d0000002, a java.util.concurrent.locks.ReentrantLock),
  which is held by "indexer-worker-1"
